content:
Thân gửi các game thủ Việt Nam, vui lòng để lại góp ý về bản dịch tiếng Việt trong phần bình luận của bài đăng này, bao gồm nhưng không giới hạn ở: lỗi, lỗi dịch thuật, cách diễn đạt khó hiểu, góp ý...

Chúng tôi sẽ đọc và thu thập tin nhắn của bạn một cách cẩn thận🌹 .
thread_title: Bộ sưu tập phản hồi bản dịch tiếng Việt

content:
Пожалуйста, игроки, использующие русский язык, оставляйте свои мысли о переводе Русский в разделе комментариев к этому посту. Это включает, но не ограничивается: ошибки, проблемы с переводом, трудные для понимания выражения, предложения...

Мы будем просматривать и собирать все ваши комментарии🌹

Por favor, los jugadores que usan español, dejen sus opiniones sobre la traducción de Español en la sección de comentarios de este post. Esto incluye, pero no se limita a: errores, bugs, expresiones difíciles de entender, sugerencias...

Revisaremos y recopilaremos todos los comentarios🌹

Please English language keepers, leave any thoughts about English translation in the game in the comment section of this post.
including but not limited to: bugs, translation errors, expressions that are difficult to understand, suggestions...

We will check and collect everyone's comments one by one🌹

Hello,  Keeper!
There are currently 11 languages in the game for the  Keeper to choose from, but due to the size and resources of the team, we have to use AI translation.

🌹 In view of the imperfections of AI translation, we plan and have begun to optimize the text translation of all languages.

▶ **On March 12, we have updated the optimized version of the English translation in the game. **
The following are the main optimization contents:
（1）Optimize the problem of confusing words when expressing the same meaning in different texts in the same context
 (such as: in the same context, power is used at A and strength is used at B)；
（2）Optimize the words in some texts to make them closer to the meaning expressed by the Chinese text；
（3）Optimize the format of punctuation marks.

▶** Future plans**
（1）For more than ten languages in the game, such as Japanese, German, Korean, etc., we will optimize and launch them in the near future；
（2）From March 17 to March 21, we will update the optimized versions of Indonesian, Thai, and Vietnamese.

**🔥Multi-language localization opinion collection🔥**
（1）Goya will create multiple  "opinion collection posts" in different languages in the 【Translation Feedback]】channel. 
Keepers can provide feedback in the comment area of the post in their own language；
（2）Feedback content includes but is not limited to：bugs, translation errors, difficult to understand expressions, suggestions... 
Keepers can speak freely in the comment area for any language localization-related content, and we will confirm and treat them seriously.

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——
Thank you for your continued support and companionship. 
Because of you, Mythag University has more confidence to move forward ❤️ .

May the Silver Key guide the way ——
@everyone
thread_title: Game text multilingual localization opinions collection & future optimization plans

content:
Veuillez laisser vos commentaires sur la traduction de  Français dans la section des commentaires de ce post, si vous utilisez le français. Cela inclut, mais ne se limite pas à : bugs, erreurs de traduction, expressions difficiles à comprendre, suggestions...

Nous examinerons et collecterons tous vos commentaires🌹
thread_title: Traduction en Français - Collecte de Traduction en Français - Collecte de Retour

content:
한국 플레이어 여러분, 버그, 번역 오류, 이해하기 어려운 표현, 제안 사항 등을 포함하되 이에 국한되지 않고, 이 게시물의 댓글 섹션을 통해 한국어 번역에 대한 제안을 남겨 주시기 바랍니다.

귀하의 메시지를 주의 깊게 읽고 수집하겠습니다🌹 .

Por favor, jogadores que usam português, deixem suas opiniões sobre a tradução de Português na seção de comentários deste post. Isso inclui, mas não se limita a: erros, bugs, expressões difíceis de entender, sugestões...

Vamos revisar e coletar todos os comentários🌹

ผู้เล่นชาวไทยที่รัก โปรดแสดงข้อเสนอแนะเกี่ยวกับการแปลภาษาไทยในส่วนความเห็นของโพสต์นี้ ซึ่งรวมถึงแต่ไม่จำกัดเพียง: ข้อบกพร่อง ข้อผิดพลาดในการแปล สำนวนที่เข้าใจยาก ข้อเสนอแนะ...

เราจะอ่านและเก็บรวบรวมข้อความของคุณอย่างระมัดระวัง🌹
thread_title: การรวบรวมคำติชมการแปลภาษาไทย

content:
日本語話者の皆様は、この投稿のコメント欄に、ゲーム内の日本語翻訳に関するご意見を寄せていただけますでしょうか？
バグ、翻訳エラー、わかりにくい表現、提案など、何でも構いません。

こちらは必ず、いただいたメッセージをちゃんと一つずつ確認し、訂正いたします🌹 。

Para pemain Indonesia yang terhormat, silakan tinggalkan saran Anda tentang terjemahan bahasa Indonesia di bagian komentar posting ini, termasuk tetapi tidak terbatas pada: bug, kesalahan penerjemahan, ekspresi yang sulit dipahami, saran...

Kami akan membaca dan mengumpulkan pesan Anda dengan cermat🌹 .
thread_title: Kumpulan Umpan Balik Terjemahan Bahasa Indonesia

content:
Bitte hinterlassen Sie als deutschsprachige Spieler Ihre Meinungen über die Deutsche-Übersetzung in den Kommentaren zu diesem Beitrag. Dies bezieht sich auf, aber nicht nur auf: Fehler, Übersetzungsfehler, schwer verständliche Ausdrücke, Vorschläge...

Wir werden alle Kommentare einzeln überprüfen und sammeln🌹
